start.speaker: greta
start.text: Back again? Good — I've been hearing things you'll want to know. Sit down, have a drink.

options.text: Anything strange about Brother Maren lately?
I need a room for the night.
Just checking in. I'll be going.

voss_legion_gossip.speaker: greta
voss_legion_gossip.text: That mercenary captain — Voss — she was in here last night. Had a few drinks and started talking to her lieutenant. I wasn't eavesdropping, mind you. I was... nearby.

voss_legion_2.speaker: greta
voss_legion_2.text: She mentioned the Ironmarch Legion by name. Said they've got scouts on the eastern road already. If Ashvale's lord falls, they'll move in within a month. Voss is trying to decide if she should defend this place or get out before the storm.

maren_strange_purchases.speaker: greta
maren_strange_purchases.text: Now THAT is interesting you ask. He's been buying candles — dozens of them. Black ones, not the church white. And last week, he came in asking if I had any ash from burned oak.

maren_strange_2.speaker: greta
maren_strange_2.text: But the strangest thing? I smelled something on his robes. Not incense. Something chemical. Sharp. Like the stuff the old apothecary used to keep in locked jars.

room_done.speaker: greta
room_done.text: Same room as before. The sheets are... mostly fresh. Lock the door. And if you hear anything from the cellar, it's just rats. Probably.
